titleStmt.title: SII 31.73: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 73. (A.R. No. B 200 of 1938.) ANIMELA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the image of Gaṇēśa to the west of the village Animela.
It is dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Vaiśākha, ba. 7, Tuesday corresponding to May 8, the week being Monday 1531 A.D. f.d.t. °79.

Fragmentary. Registers the gift of magama tax levied on the carts carrying the cotton and asujavaḷi (?) which are passing through the places like Chintakanuma. Pulivendala kanuma and Gaṇḍikanuma to the god Saṅgamēśvara at Animela by the merchantile guilds (Vubhaya nānā-dēśa-Ayyāvaḷi and Chālumūla-pekkaṁḍru) while the king Achyutadēvarāya was ruling the country from Vidyānagram (Vijayanagara). The members of these guilds are described as the followers of Gaṇēśvaradēva, Gourīśvaradēva and Śrī Mallikārjunadēva obviosuly of Śrīśailam and described as the protectors of Vīrabalaṅjadharma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
1453 Agunēṭīkhara
vatsara vaiśākha ba 8 ma śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa śrīAcyutarāya ma
hārāyalugāru vidyānagara
maṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍu
dayi prupṛdhivī sāmrājyaṁ cēyu
cūnuṁḍagānu śrīAnimela saṁ
gamēśvaradēvuniki dīpārādhanaku
śrīmatu svastiśrīmallikā¨rjuna dē
varadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhakula
jainagirinunna divāpṛ
dhivīmahattu mukhyamaina śidha
bhikṣāvritti svasti samasta janavi
nutapaṁccmātādi bhūmaṁḍala vi
va[¨rṇi]tabhāvika bhūrigaṇaguṇālaṁ
kṛta satyaśaucācāra cāritranaya
na vipulavijñāna vīrasiṁhvāsana vīra
bhalāṁjavīrabalō dha
¨rmma pratipālakulayina svasti sama
sta nijanāmāṁka mauḷikā praśasta sa
hitulayina śrīmadgaṇīśvara dēva
gaurīśvara dēvara divyaśrīpādapadmā
rādhakulayina vubhaya nānādēśa Ayyāva
ḷi mukhyamaina cālumūla samasta pekkaṁḍra
luṁnu Animela saṁgamēśvara dēvuniki maga
ma dhāravōsi Istimi gāna yī magama dha¨rma
śāsanānaku vicāraṁ puliveṁdala kanuma
ciṁtakanuma gaṁḍikanumala naḍacē dūdi ka
ṁṭlaṁ Asujavaḷi modalayina rasabaṁ
di naka
lekhanu yistimani yiccina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ yima
marapinanu kulā
cāra navāru
yiccina dha¨rma
śāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 31.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
